divergences.title: Layer position is measured from lottie-web SVG matrices at selected source frames
divergences.observedBehavior: Animated layer position is compared as numeric matrix translation at each selected source frame; rendered PNG placement is review evidence only after this source-frame fact matches.

sourcePointers.note: Extracts SVG matrix values from pinned lottie-web.
Evaluates PureLottie source-frame transform matrices.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Split position values rejoin before transform matrix comparison
divergences.observedBehavior: Lottie split-position x and y channels are evaluated at the selected source frame and rejoined before PureLottie compares the resulting world transform to lottie-web.

sourcePointers.note: Builds transform component traces for split position.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Anchor scale rotation and position use lottie-web transform order
divergences.observedBehavior: The transform evaluator composes anchor translation, scale, clockwise rotation, and position in the same order as the lottie-web matrix observed in committed traces.

sourcePointers.note: Documents and implements matrix operation order.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Shape group transforms are scoped to group geometry rather than layer transforms
divergences.observedBehavior: A shape transform applies inside the shape group walk and changes the generated path geometry; it is not interchangeable with the containing layer transform.

sourcePointers.note: Maintains group-scoped shape transform operations.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Shape group opacity is an atomic compositing fact
divergences.observedBehavior: Group opacity applies to the group as a compositing unit and cannot be treated as independent per-shape opacity without changing source intent.

sourcePointers.note: Records group compositing scope before lowering.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Parent transforms are included in child world matrices
divergences.observedBehavior: Parent layers, including null layers and animated parents, remain in the source graph and affect child world matrices at every selected source frame.

sourcePointers.note: Binds parent chains before RenderIR lowering.
Appends parent matrix evidence.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Ellipse direction changes contour order even when bounds are unchanged
divergences.observedBehavior: Ellipse direction affects the generated contour order and later trim behavior even when untrimmed ellipse bounds remain identical.

sourcePointers.note: Emits direction evidence for generated source geometry.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Rounded rectangles use lottie-web radius clamp and control constant
divergences.observedBehavior: Rounded rectangle corner radius and cubic control points are measured against lottie-web geometry rather than guessed from generic rounded-rect intuition.

sourcePointers.note: Records the rounded-rectangle constants used by source geometry.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Polygon and star point counts follow lottie-web source geometry
divergences.observedBehavior: Polygon and star expansion follows lottie-web point handling, rotation, direction, and inner/outer radius semantics before PureDraw lowering.

sourcePointers.note: Expands polygon and star source geometry.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Fill-rule is retained as a source style fact
divergences.observedBehavior: Even-odd fill rule changes rasterization for identical vertices, so the style fact is preserved and compared numerically before image review.

sourcePointers.note: Retains fill style metadata in the shape program.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Stroke dash arrays and animated width are numeric source facts
divergences.observedBehavior: Dash arrays and animated stroke width are sampled or reported as source-frame stroke facts before any backend pixel comparison is accepted.

sourcePointers.note: Carries stroke style metadata.
Evaluates source-frame stroke values.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Trim percentages map to measured contour-length segments
divergences.observedBehavior: Trim start and end percentages select path-length ranges, not arbitrary quadrants; animated trim is evaluated at each selected source frame before backend stroke fractions are asserted.

sourcePointers.note: Records normalized trim ranges and selected source segments.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Layer frame windows use inclusive ip and exclusive op
divergences.observedBehavior: Source frames are visible when ip is less than or equal to the frame and the frame is strictly less than op; selected boundary frames prove both sides.

sourcePointers.note: Applies composition and layer frame windows.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Mask path mode inversion and opacity are source graph facts
divergences.observedBehavior: Mask geometry and style are retained in RenderIR layer graph evidence before PureLayer backend capabilities decide whether masking can be lowered.

sourcePointers.note: Records mask source graph facts.
Checks backend evidence is attached before lowering gaps are trusted.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Track matte source and target layers bind by layer relationship
divergences.observedBehavior: Track matte source-target relationships are explicit layer graph facts and are not inferred from rendered pixels or guessed from visual order.

sourcePointers.note: Binds matte source and target records.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Precomposition layers expose child composition local frames
divergences.observedBehavior: Precomposition boundaries and child local source frames are emitted as source intent before flattening or backend lowering decisions can obscure them.

sourcePointers.note: Resolves precomposition layer graph boundaries.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.

divergences.title: Time remap remains an explicit diagnosed semantic boundary
divergences.observedBehavior: Time remap is recorded as a source fact and kept as a diagnosed boundary until PureLottie can lower the evaluator semantics exactly rather than approximating child frame selection.

sourcePointers.note: Records time-remap source facts in the layer graph.
Proves the boundary is reported instead of silently lowered.

witness.reason: Committed lottie-web intent traces record the reference-engine numeric fact that this divergence describes.
